items.title: SUPERNOVA REBOOT 那週末到底發生了什麼事？
items.author: Gordon Yeung
items.content:
<article>*記得開啟CC字幕
第一次放棄農曆新年，跑到日本看星街演唱會⋯
結果當然是超級值得🙇🏻‍♂️各種Offkai /表演/ 聯成活動，多不勝數，是滿滿的星街✨ 幸好選擇有來

Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/gordonyeung314/
X：https://x.com/hky_gordon</article>

items.title: I Went to the Hololive Snow Party Collab Event
items.author: Linsaloty
items.content:
<article>Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty
BGM: "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks
"Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks

0:00 - Intro
1:30 - Puzzle game

3:08 - MV theatre
3:33 - Foods and drinks
4:36 - Goods
5:18 - Final thoughts</article>
